# >>> hermes-repo memory (do not edit this block manually)
# 不提交（个人数据 / 运行时状态）
.memory/captures/
.memory/consolidate-state.json
.memory/.consolidate.lock

# 提交到 Git（团队共享的知识）
!.memory/MEMORY.md
!.memory/config.json
!.memory/rules/
!.memory/domains/
!.memory/workflows/
!.memory/decisions/
!.memory/incidents/
# <<< hermes-repo memory
